steps.title: Apply the factoring from the given condition
Compute the target value
steps.content: So $-14-2x = -2 \cdot 5 = -10$. That matches choice A — A is correct.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to match the computed result to the answer choices. The value or equation found above matches choice A, -10. The other choices do not satisfy the same condition from the question, so A is correct.
